# uptimekuma_monitor_globalping (Data Source)

Get Globalping monitor information by ID or name

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a Globalping monitor by name
data "uptimekuma_monitor_globalping" "by_name" {
  name = "Globalping Ping Monitor"
}

# Look up a Globalping monitor by ID
data "uptimekuma_monitor_globalping" "by_id" {
  id = 42
}

# Use the data source to reference an existing monitor
output "globalping_subtype" {
  value = data.uptimekuma_monitor_globalping.by_name.subtype
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Monitor identifier
- `name` (String) Monitor name

### Read-Only

- `dns_resolve_server` (String) DNS server to use for resolution
- `dns_resolve_type` (String) DNS record type to resolve
- `expected_value` (String) Expected value for JSON path evaluation
- `hostname` (String) Target hostname for DNS or port checks
- `invert_keyword` (Boolean) Whether the keyword match logic is inverted
- `ip_family` (String) IP protocol version
- `json_path` (String) JSON path expression to evaluate in the response
- `json_path_operator` (String) Comparison operator for the JSON path check
- `keyword` (String) Keyword to search for in the HTTP response body
- `location` (String) Probe location selector
- `ping_count` (Number) Number of ping packets to send
- `port` (Number) Target port for port checks
- `protocol` (String) Protocol used for ping or traceroute checks
- `subtype` (String) Check type performed by Globalping probes
